name: CLX - MGA Insurance Quote Comparison v1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, status: $json.status || 400, error: $json.error || 'Invalid request' }) }}

meta.notes: Public marketplace quote-comparison endpoint. POST /webhook/mga/insurance/quote-comparison with { vertical: 'auto'|'home'|'tenant'|'travel', form_data: {...}, contact?: { name, email, phone, city, province }, source_domain? }. Inserts an anonymous (or named) lead row tagged source='marketplace_<vertical>' + marketplace_status='quote_viewed', then generates 5 estimated carrier quotes via deterministic vertical-specific formulas (Phase 1 seeded estimates, Phase 3 will swap to live insurer rate APIs without changing the response shape). Persists each quote to marketplace_quotes, returns sorted cards with is_lowest flag for frontend highlight. CORS allows insurance.crystallux.org / crystallux.org / cheapcover.ca for the public + white-label flow. The 'Get this quote' click is handled by a separate quote-select workflow (Phase 2 build).
